'''Graham Law''' is a former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity (Wildcats)]], as a {{rlp|ce|so|sr}}, or {{rlp|lf}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Genealogical Information==
Graham Law is the [[sibling|brother]] of the rugby union, and rugby league footballer; [[Neil Law]].
